ibeon jumareun eottae
(How about this weekend?)

Just tell me, anytime

(That coffee and bread we talked about)

(I’ve never felt like this before)

(Should we go see the night ocean?)

(Even though we don’t have much to say)

ige da sarang animmwolkka
(If this isn’t love, what is it?)

neon eotteoge saenggakhae
(What do you think?)

padosorie muthyeobeorin gobaegijiman
(My confession got lost in the sound of the waves)

ne useumeun mwolkka?
(But I still wonder what your smile means)

saeeo naoneunde
(It keeps slipping out)

amuri magado

siwonhan nalssimajeo nal douneun ge
(even the cool weather feels like it’s helping me)

boda hancham namneun yeoune nolla
(I’m surprised how long this feeling stays)

geotda boni matchwojin bal
(Somehow our steps fall into rhythm)

matjabeun onggi nae soneul tago nara
(the warmth in our hands spreads through me)

eodirongga nal deryeodajul geomman gata
(like it could take me somewhere far away)

eodirado joa
(Anywhere is fine)

neoramyeon na galge
(If it’s with you, I’ll go)

wae jakku saenggangnalkka
(Why do you keep coming to my mind?)

na ireonjeogi eomneunde
(I’ve never felt like this before)

bambada boreo galkka
(Should we go see the night ocean?)

hal yaegineun ttakhi eomneunde
(Even though we don’t have much to say)

ige da sarang animmwolkka
(If this isn’t love, what is it?)

neon eotteoge saenggakhae
(What do you think?)

padosorie muthyeobeorin gobaegijiman
(My confession got lost in the sound of the waves)

ne useumeun mwolkka?
(But I still wonder what your smile means)

이번 주말은 어때
(How about this weekend?)

Just tell me, anytime

아무래도 이 날씨면 feels better out
(With weather like this, it feels better outside)

저번에 말한 커피랑 빵
(That coffee and bread we talked about)

창가 자리면 더 fine
(It’d be even better by the window)

창문 틈 드는 바람에 식히는 뺨
(The breeze through the window cools my cheeks)

이대로 시간이 멈췄음 하는데
(I kinda wish time would stop like this)

어쩌면 내일도 네가 필요한데
(Maybe I’ll need you tomorrow too)

평소보다 가까이 앉아
(We’re sitting closer than usual)

번져간 대화가 생각이 나

뒤척이다가 밤새도록 나 잠도 못 자네

(Why do you keep coming to my mind?)

(What do you think?)

(My confession got lost in the sound of the waves)

선물인가
(maybe it’s a gift)

(even the cool weather feels like it’s helping me)

어떤 영화나 음악
(More than any movie or song)

보다 한참 남는 여운에 놀라
(I’m surprised how long this feeling stays)

걷다 보니 맞춰진 발
(Somehow our steps fall into rhythm)

맞잡은 온기 내 손을 타고 날아
(the warmth in our hands spreads through me)

어디론가 날 데려다줄 것만 같아
(like it could take me somewhere far away)

어디라도 좋아
(Anywhere is fine)

너라면 나 갈게
(If it’s with you, I’ll go)

(Why do you keep coming to my mind?)

(Even though we don’t have much to say)

(If this isn’t love, what is it?)

넌 어떻게 생각해
(What do you think?)

파도소리에 묻혀버린 고백이지만
(My confession got lost in the sound of the waves)

네 웃음은 뭘까?
(But I still wonder what your smile means)
